title: Enphase Energy (ENPH) Q4 2024 Earnings Summary
text: Enphase delivered strong Q4 2024 results with revenue of $382.7 million and non-GAAP gross margin of 53.2%. The company achieved non-GAAP net income of $125.9 million ($0.94 diluted EPS) while generating $159.2 million in free cash flow. Cash reserves reached $1.72 billion. The company shipped approximately 878 megawatts of microinverters and 152.4 megawatt hours of batteries. European operations faced significant headwinds, with revenues declining 25% quarter-over-quarter. Battery sales in the US were down 8% in Q4 compared to Q3 due to lesser channel restocking. Management expects sequential growth in battery storage throughout 2025, driven by new product launches including IQ Battery 5Ps, IQ EV chargers, and IQ9 microinverters. The company anticipates margin improvements from these advanced products featuring cost-reduction technologies. Regarding baseline guidance, executives indicated Q1 2025 should reach approximately $322 million in revenue, aligned with seasonal patterns. Geographic expansion into Europe, India, and Southeast Asia represents another growth avenue for the coming year.
